population_a.specification: ≥30% LRV differential at step edges, door frames, counter edges; ≥50% at critical junctions

population_b.specification: Muted palette; ≤20 LRV differential in sensory retreat zones; no high-contrast pattern

resolution.description: Zone-based: ≥30 LRV on primary accessible routes (safety-critical governs); ≤20 LRV in sensory retreat (Zone 3). Plain floor (C-06) satisfies both DEM fall prevention and VIS orientation via perimeter contrast.

decision_tree.root: Is this a primary accessible route?

no.question: Designated sensory retreat zone (F-01 Zone 3)?
no.yes: Apply ≤20 LRV; VIS via wall contrast + landmarks

population_a.specification: Hearing loop IEC 60118-4; STI ≥0.75 for CI users

population_b.specification: No amplification in retreat zones; ≤30 dBA Zone 3; no sound masking

resolution.description: Hearing loop amplifies direct speech without broadcast. Independent from PA/music. RT60 ≤0.3s governs in NDV co-occurrence (stricter than DEAF ≤0.4s — benefits both). No sound masking where NDV is primary.

decision_tree.root: Is hearing loop required in this space?

yes.question: Does NDV co-occur as primary population?
yes.yes: RT60 ≤0.3s; loop with independent audio input; PA muted; no sound masking

decision_tree.no: Standard acoustic provision per room type

resolution.description: 32–45mm serves both populations. Circular preferred. Below 32mm: inadequate standard grip. Above 45mm: both populations degrade.

decision_tree.note: Tier 2 OT assessment resolves position within range for individual

resolution.description: ≤18°C governs (MS safety-critical — heat causes neurological worsening). Warmth delivered individually: radiant panels, heated grab bar coatings, personal thermal options.

decision_tree.root: Does the space serve MS/NEU users?
decision_tree.yes: Ambient ≤18°C governs. Provide individual supplemental radiant heating for PAIN users.
decision_tree.no: Standard thermal comfort per building type

population_a.specification: Full ISO 23599 truncated dome on primary routes (safety-critical)

population_b.specification: Smooth surface preferred; vibration pain trigger; wheel resistance

resolution.description: ISO 23599 truncated dome governs on primary routes (VIS/DBL safety function). Secondary routes: high-contrast flush edging strip. JIS T9251 dome sizing (5mm height, 25mm base, 60mm spacing) is the only parameter with full empirical resolution across both populations.

citations.finding: Dome sizing empirically resolved in JP context

decision_tree.root: Is this a primary accessible route?
decision_tree.yes: ISO 23599 truncated dome (safety-critical governs). Use JIS T9251 sizing for PAIN vibration mitigation.

resolved_conflicts.unresolvable_residual: No product currently meets both full ISO 23599 profile and vibration attenuation for PAIN

population_a.specification: Glazed junctions (DeafSpace visual advance warning); open-plan ≥2400mm for signing pairs

population_b.specification: Compartmentalised zones with predictable, enclosed approaches

resolution.description: Graduated spatial model: open circulation spine (≥2400mm signing routes) transitions to enclosed sub-zones. Low-reflectance matte glazing at junctions; etched lower band. Prospect-refuge balance.

yes.question: Does NDV co-occur?
yes.yes: Graduated model: open spine + enclosed sub-zones. Matte glazing.

decision_tree.no: Standard spatial configuration per room type

population_a.specification: ≥300 lux eye level (DEM); ≥250 melanopic EDI; ≥500 lux task (VIS)

population_b.specification: ≤200 lux preferred; dimmable to ≤50 lux; no cool-white CCT in sensory zones

resolution.description: Three-zone model: Zone 1 (≥300 lux / ≥500 task / ≥200 EML); Zone 2 (150–300 lux, dimmable); Zone 3 (0–150 lux user-controlled). Individual dimming (B-06) is the highest-impact single conflict mitigation. CCT: ≥4000K morning in DEM areas; ≤2700K from 19:00.

decision_tree.root: Which F-01 sensory zone is this space?
decision_tree.zone_1: ≥300 lux ambient / ≥500 task / ≥200 EML. No user dimming below 200 lux.
decision_tree.zone_2: 150–300 lux at workplane with user-dimmable range. ≥500 lux task lighting available.
decision_tree.zone_3: User-controlled 0–150 lux. ≤50 lux available. Warm CCT only.

population_a.specification: High-redundancy signage: pictogram + word + Braille + colour coding at all junctions

population_b.specification: Minimal visual clutter; ≤3 sign elements per decision point

resolution.description: Pictogram + word + Braille (D-08) independently satisfies both: pictograms serve DEM/IntD (simple ≤3 elements); matte sign field serves NDV (no visual noise). ≤5 colour zones per building for DEM + NDV predictability. Contrast at architectural elements, not floor patterns.

decision_tree.root: Use D-08 pictogram+word+Braille system at all decision points
decision_tree.note: Matte/non-reflective sign field; ≤5 colour zones building-wide; contrast on architectural elements not floor patterns

population_a.specification: Unobstructed loop floor plan; no dead ends; independent circulation

population_b.specification: Contained pathways with support surfaces; bilateral grab bars

resolution.description: Residential: secure garden loop with bilateral handrails + DEM freedom within perimeter. Indoor: grab bars on all extended corridors. Institutional: TIER-2-ONLY (OT assessment required).

decision_tree.residential: Secure loop with bilateral handrails. DEM freedom + MOB support on same route.
decision_tree.institutional: OT assessment mandatory. No population-level resolution in non-zoned shared space.

population_b.specification: Scented environmental cues for spatial orientation

resolution.description: Fragrance-free policy (F-06) as building-wide baseline. DEM olfactory cueing via natural food smells (kitchen adjacency) and natural scents (lavender planting ≥600mm from circulation) rather than synthetic fragrances. Natural food smells are not MCAS triggers; synthetic fragrances are.

resolved_conflicts.governing_principle: Parallel provision — natural vs synthetic distinction

decision_tree.yes: Prohibited in shared buildings (F-06). Use natural food/plant alternatives.

no.question: Is DEM olfactory orientation needed?
no.yes: Architectural-spatial: kitchen adjacency, natural planting at ≥600mm from circulation

resolved_conflicts.unresolvable_residual: Some DEM programmes use synthetic lavender diffusers — contraindicated for OFS/MCAS in shared buildings

population_a.specification: Automatic doors; no push force; 10-second hold-open

population_b.specification: Predictable actuation; no unexpected movement; advance warning

resolution.description: Integrated door spec: motion sensor ≥3m (visual warning zone); auditory chime ≤65 dBA; glazed leaf (spatial preview); ≥3s opening travel (no sudden movement); high-contrast floor activation zone (C-04 ≥30 LRV). MOB gets force-free; NDV/MH gets predictable, pre-announced movement.

decision_tree.root: Specify integrated automatic door: sensor ≥3m + chime ≤65dBA + glazed leaf + ≥3s travel + contrast activation zone
decision_tree.note: Single technical solution serves both populations

unresolvable_conflicts.conflict_label: Ambient temperature in non-zoned shared sleeping space
unresolvable_conflicts.trigger: MS-spectrum + fibromyalgia/cold-aggravated pain in shared non-zoned sleeping space where individual heating is not operationally feasible
unresolvable_conflicts.mitigation: Insulated grab bars (G-03); warm bedding; individual heated throw/vest as FM provision

unresolvable_conflicts.conflict_label: Acoustic amplification in shared open-plan space
unresolvable_conflicts.trigger: NDV/AUT and DEAF in shared open-plan space without physical zone separation
unresolvable_conflicts.mitigation: Auracast/wireless personal receiver technology; does not reduce DEAF right to accessible ambient if receiver unavailable

unresolvable_conflicts.conflict_label: Visual glazing (DEAF sightlines vs DEM reflections vs NDV visual noise)
unresolvable_conflicts.trigger: DEAF-primary building with maximised glazing + DEM/NDV secondary occupants
unresolvable_conflicts.mitigation: Clear glass upper band >1400mm (signing); frosted/etched lower band ≤1400mm (reduces reflections + visual noise). DEAF signing requirements govern when DEAF is primary.
